title: orobus stenophyllus
intro: Orobus stenophyllus, also known as the Narrow-leaved vetchling, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family. It is often used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a natural expectorant and anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Orobus stenophyllus include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to soothe digestive problems. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infusion for its medicinal purposes, although it can also be used in tincture form or as a dried powder in herbal supplements.
